name: nahida
title: Wisdom Incarnate
description: The youngest of the Seven, Nahida bears the gnosis of Dendro and the dreams of the sages of Sumeru.

passiveTalents.name: Compassion Illuminated
passiveTalents.description: When unleashing Illusory Heart, the Shrine of Maya will gain the following effects based on the elemental types of the other party members.

passiveTalents.name: Awakening Elucidated
passiveTalents.description: Each point of Nahida's Elemental Mastery beyond 200 will grant 0.1% Bonus DMG and 0.03% CRIT Rate to Tri-Karma Purification from All Schemes to Know.

passiveTalents.name: On All Things Meditated
passiveTalents.description: Nahida can use All Schemes to Know to interact with some harvestable items within a fixed AoE. This skill may be triggered even when Nahida is not the active character.

constellations.name: The Seed of Stored Knowledge
constellations.description: The Shrine of Maya will last 6s longer.

constellations.name: The Root of All Fullness
constellations.description: Opponents that are marked by Seeds of Skandha applied by Nahida herself will be affected by the following: Burning, Bloom, Hyperbloom, and Burgeon Reaction DMG they receive is increased by 40%.

constellations.name: The Shoot of Conscious Attainment
constellations.description: Increases the Level of All Schemes to Know by 3. Maximum upgrade level is 15.

constellations.name: The Stem of Manifest Inference
constellations.description: When 1/2/3/4 (or more) nearby opponents are affected by All Schemes to Know's Seeds of Skandha, Nahida's Elemental Mastery will be increased by 100/120/140/160.

constellations.name: The Leaves of Enlightening Speech
constellations.description: Increases the Level of Illusory Heart by 3. Maximum upgrade level is 15.

constellations.name: The Fruit of Reason's Culmination
constellations.description: When Nahida hits an opponent affected by All Schemes to Know's Seeds of Skandha with Tri-Karma Purification: Karmic Oblivion from All Schemes to Know, the DMG dealt is based on 200% of Nahida's ATK and 400% of her Elemental Mastery.
